name: split_s_impact
notes: Hold Push(1) + Override(12) from t=1: bunt the nose down and fly it into the sea. Regression for the fight-ending the sim never had -- a hard pull used to fly THROUGH the sea to -10,679 ft and keep integrating, world rendered black, HUD still reading out closure. Expect alt to bottom at ~0 (never negative thousands), frozen=true, and the IMPACT banner drawn.
